Agile Extension to the BABOK - Overview
Nov 14, 2024  12:00 PM - 1:00 PM
Eastern Standard Time
Overview of Agile Extension to the BABOK
As part of our continuing monthly study session series, IIBA East Tennessee is pleased to be presenting and overview of IIBA's
Agile Extension to the BABOK Guide
. This session will review the guide, which describes the techniques and practices you can use to leverage business analysis skills and an agile mindset to deliver business value.

Annual General Meeting 2025
Dec 18, 2025  8:00 PM - 9:00 PM
Eastern Standard Time
Join us for the 2025 Annual General Meeting as we review this year’s successes, present the financial report, and elect our new board. We’ll share the chapter’s achievements, recognize outstanding contributions, and unveil our vision for 2026. Be part of the conversation that sets the course for the year ahead.
The 2025 Annual General Meeting is your chance to celebrate our chapter’s accomplishments and help shape the future.
